queries.question: Show all fantasy films, also show all horrors with a 20000000.0 budget.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.title 
FROM Categories JOIN Films ON Categories.id = Films.categoryId
WHERE Categories.categoryName = "Fantasy" OR Categories.categoryName = "Horror" AND Films.budget = 20000000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?categories a :Categories .
  ?films a :Film .
  ?films p:hasCategories ?categories .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?categories p:categoryName ?categoryname_w .
  ?categories p:categoryName ?categoryname_w2 .
  ?films p:budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((STR(?categoryname_w) = "Fantasy" || (STR(?categoryname_w2) = "Horror" && (STR(?budget_w) = "20000000" || STR(?budget_w) = "20000000.0"))))
}

queries.question: Provide all fantasy with a budget of 20000000.0 and horrors with the same budget.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.title 
FROM Categories JOIN Films ON Categories.id = Films.categoryId
WHERE (Categories.categoryName = "Fantasy" OR Categories.categoryName = "Horror") AND Films.budget = 20000000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?categories a :Categories .
  ?films a :Film .
  ?films p:hasCategories ?categories .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?categories p:categoryName ?categoryname_w .
  ?categories p:categoryName ?categoryname_w2 .
  ?films p:budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?categoryname_w) = "Fantasy" || STR(?categoryname_w2) = "Horror")) && (STR(?budget_w) = "20000000" || STR(?budget_w) = "20000000.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all fantasy films and horrors with a 20000000 budget.
